decisions.rationale: User passed --tdd; all Phase 2 plans executed RED->GREEN. Flag is now persistent — toggle off if per-run was intended.

decisions.decision: Phase 2 waves executed sequentially on main tree (not parallel worktrees)
decisions.rationale: Disjoint source files but shared .planning tracking files; sequential avoids merge races and keeps STATE/ROADMAP writes clean.

decisions.decision: VerificationRetryJob dispatches pending users with null NIN (MVP limitation)
decisions.rationale: Real production path needs encrypted NIN storage; deferred to post-NIDA-confirmation. Async path at registration always has the real NIN, so Phase 2 goal unaffected.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 3 to plan Wallet & Payments. Phase 3's first consumer is the UserVerified(50 credits) outbox event published by identity-service OutboxRelay to RabbitMQ topic exchange 'identity.events'. Consider /gsd-discuss-phase 3 first if Azampay/ledger design needs context gathering.
context_notes: Phase 2 (identity-auth) is fully complete and verified: 6/6 plans, 47 tests green (0 failures), verifier scored 9/9 must-haves achieved. All work committed atomically and pushed to origin/main (xxGreyscale/sms-reseller, latest 2d060b0). Project at 2/7 phases (29%). Clean working tree. Build order locked: identity(done) -> wallet/payments(next) -> contacts/messaging -> notifications/admin -> flutter. Phase 3 = Wallet & Payments: append-only credit ledger with pessimistic SELECT FOR UPDATE reservation, Azampay STK push (sandbox confirmed) with transactional outbox + idempotent callbacks, bundle catalog (PYMT-01). Azampay is mock-first via PaymentGateway interface + StubPaymentGateway per CLAUDE.md.
